title: Why Are Humans Afraid Of The Dark? An Evolutionary Biologist Explains The Ancient Fear We Can’t Shake
description: By the time you tell yourself there’s nothing in the dark alley, your amygdala has already disagreed. Here’s why, according to evolutionary research.

title: Pete Hegseth compares media to the Pharisees, ancient Jewish sect derided by Christians
description: (JTA) — Almost exactly seven years after a presidential candidate stopped referring to “Pharisees” in response to allegations of antisemitism, another prominent political Pete has invoked the term. And this time, it’s not just Jews but Christians who are finding the allusion offensive. In 2019, it was Pete Buttigieg, then an Indiana mayor on the...
